title: Angle Alligator
short_description: Aim the alligator's jaw to the angle he asks for and chomp the sliding snack — miss and his jaw locks open and a dentist bird moves in.
description: Snappy the alligator only chomps snacks served at EXACTLY the right jaw angle — and now YOU control the jaw. Move your mouse or finger to aim, open his jaw to the angle he asks for (acute, right, obtuse, straight, or an exact number of degrees) and hold it there as the snack slides into his mouth. Match it and CHOMP; miss and his jaw locks open, a dentist bird moves in, and Snappy gets a lecture about flossing. It's a real-time aiming arcade game that turns reading and estimating angles into a reflex. Grade bands ramp from acute/right/obtuse, to estimating degrees, to straight angles and tight-tolerance aiming, and every snack comes in faster. A free online angles and geometry game for kids in grades 3–5, with combo and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Move your mouse or finger to aim Snappy's jaw (or nudge it with the ↑/↓ arrow keys). Set it to the angle he asks for before the snack slides into his mouth, and CHOMP.
